text: vv. 17-20: The order of the text here seems to be confused both in the Greek and in the Latin; they are here interpreted in the light of the Hebrew. The words, ‘I told you’, are not in the original, but there seems to be a deliberate quotation from 20.32, 33.
vv. 21-28: There is further confusion here, as even the grammar of the sentences shews, and several phrases cannot be interpreted with certainty.
